name: CVB FINANCIAL CORP
summary: PART I CVB Financial Corp. CVB Financial Corp. (referred to herein on an unconsolidated basis as CVB and on a consolidated basis as we, our or the Company) is a bank holding company incorporated in California on April 27, 1981 and registered with the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Federal Reserve) under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHCA). The Company commenced business on December 30, 1981 when, pursuant to a reorganization, it acquired all of the voti...
